---
title: "Bioethics: An Open Educational Resource"
subtitle: "Course Notes and Lecture Slides"
author: "Brendan Shea, PhD"
date: last-modified
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

## About This Course

This is an open educational resource (OER) for a course in **bioethics** — the study of ethical issues arising from advances in biology, medicine, and healthcare.

All materials are freely available for non-commercial educational use under a [Creative Commons BY-NC 4.0 license](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc/4.0/).

---

## Course Materials

| # | Part | Topic | Slides | Notes |
|---|------|-------|--------|-------|
| 1A | Principles & Reasoning | The Four Principles; Reading a Moral Argument | [Slides](chapters/01-introduction-slides.html) | [Notes](chapters/01-introduction.html) |
| 1B | Principles & Reasoning | Ethical Theories as Lenses | [Slides](chapters/01b-theories-slides.html) | [Notes](chapters/01b-theories.html) |
| 2A | History & Relationship | From Hippocrates to the Belmont Report | [Slides](chapters/02a-history-slides.html) | [Notes](chapters/02a-history.html) |
| 2B | History & Relationship | The Clinical Relationship: Consent, Autonomy, and Confidentiality | [Slides](chapters/02b-clinical-relationship-slides.html) | [Notes](chapters/02b-clinical-relationship.html) |
| 3A | Research Ethics | How Clinical Research Works (and Why It's Different from Care) | [Slides](chapters/03a-clinical-research-slides.html) | [Notes](chapters/03a-clinical-research.html) |
| 3B | Research Ethics | From Tuskegee to Today: Protecting Research Subjects | [Slides](chapters/03b-protecting-research-subjects-slides.html) | [Notes](chapters/03b-protecting-research-subjects.html) |

---

## How to Use These Materials

- **Slides** are built with [reveal.js](https://revealjs.com/) — press `F` for fullscreen, `S` for speaker notes, `?` for all shortcuts.
- **Notes** are the full HTML version with a table of contents.
- All source files (`.qmd`) are available on [GitHub](https://github.com/brendanpshea/bioethics-oer).

---

## License

[![CC BY-NC 4.0](https://licensebuttons.net/l/by-nc/4.0/88x31.png)](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc/4.0/)

This work is licensed under a [Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial 4.0 International License](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc/4.0/).

You are free to share and adapt these materials for non-commercial purposes, provided you give appropriate credit.
